steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0007 (Granite batch baseline) and t0009 (Parakeet batch baseline) are completed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Write streaming simulation code, run Parakeet and Granite on gold-92 with 32 kB PCM chunks on Azure H100 NVL, compute all 7 registered metrics.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, prediction assets, charts; mark task completed.
